ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "league_rank" INTEGER /* League rank of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team plays in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the match was home or away */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals scored against the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned from the match */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the competition (e.g., 1st round, 2nd round) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards in the match */,
  "possession" REAL /* Average possession percentage for the team in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "xG" REAL /* Expected goals (xG) stat for the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Total number of shots taken by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "minutes_played_in_season" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goalkeepers" (
  "goalkeeper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goalkeeper */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the goalkeeper belongs to */,
  "goalkeeper_name" TEXT /* Name of the goalkeeper */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Total clean sheets by the goalkeeper */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Total saves made by the goalkeeper */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the goalkeeper */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances made by the goalkeeper */,
  "crosses_stopped" INTEGER /* Number of crosses stopped by the goalkeeper */,
  "punches" INTEGER /* Number of punches made by the goalkeeper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goalkeeper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goalkeepers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match associated with the attendance */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance number for the match */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the stadium filled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match associated with the analytics */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals (xG) for the team */,
  "expected_goals_against" REAL /* Expected goals against (xGA) for the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference based on expected goals */,
  "xGD_per_90" REAL /* Expected goal difference per 90 minutes */,
  "expected_assists" REAL /* Expected assists (xA) for the team */,
  "expected_goals_on_target" REAL /* Expected goals on target (xGOT) for the team */,
  "expected_goals_against_on_target" REAL /* Expected goals against on target (xGAOT) for the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target for the team */,
  "shots_against" INTEGER /* Number of shots against the team */,
  "shots_on_target_against" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target against the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "top_scorers" (
  "scorer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each top scorer record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the top scorer is part of */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is the top scorer */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the top scorer record */,
  "goals_in_season" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scorer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_top_scorers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_top_scorers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player_statistics ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "tactics" TEXT /* Coaching tactics employed by the coach */,
  "date_appointed" TEXT /* Date the coach was appointed */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the coach left the team (if applicable) */,
  "title_won" INTEGER /* Number of titles won by the coach */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Contract start date */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* Contract end date */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player in millions */,
  "international_caps" INTEGER /* Number of international caps the player has */,
  "international_goals" INTEGER /* Number of international goals the player has scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
